import io
import string

fn rot_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    let o = b - 65
    let r = o + 13
    let m = r - 26 * (r / 26)
    m + 65
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    let o = b - 97
    let r = o + 13
    let m = r - 26 * (r / 26)
    m + 97
  else
    b
  end
end

fn rot13(_ s: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      let r = rot_byte(b)
      out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(r)}"
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    println(rot13(line))
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
